sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77717" key="panwph/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰν-ωπήεις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, <sense id="n77717.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πανόψιος</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">visible to all,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.166</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Even.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
